title: Chief Financial Officer Branch - Canada.ca
content:
## Chief Financial Officer Branch
The Chief Financial Officer Branch is the departmental focal point of accountability to ensure rigorous stewardship of resources, manage for results and provide integrated financial services. The Branch provides the necessary enabling frameworks, policies, systems, and best practices and tools to support program management and operations.
- Departmental Submissions and Performance Measurement Directorate
- Financial Operations Directorate
- Procurement and Investment Management Directorate
- Resource Management and Advisory Services Directorate
